instruction: Fix the infinite recursion causing a stack overflow.

input.title: Infinite Recursion
input.error_message: Segmentation fault (core dumped) // Due to stack exhaustion

output.technical: The function `calculate_0` calls itself infinitely without a base case. This exhausts the call stack, resulting in a stack overflow and a segmentation fault.
output.beginner: Your function keeps calling itself forever, and the computer runs out of memory to keep track of it.
output.analogy: It's like two mirrors facing each other, creating an endless tunnel of reflections. Eventually, it has to stop.
output.solution: Add a base case to stop the recursion.
output.prevention: Always define a termination condition (base case) for recursive functions.
